description:
The broadcast club celebrate post-sports day, while Arisu dwells on his conversation with Apollo.
Source: Crunchyroll

titles.title: Nene Saw / A Piece of Cake / I`ll Cherish What You Just Said Forever
Nene wa Mita / Asameshimaesa / Ima no Kotoba Zutto Taisetsu ni Suru ne
寧々は見た / A PIECE OF CAKE[朝飯前さ] / 今の言葉ずっと大切にするね
